text: My app keeps crashing on start uo, its been like this since the last update. I tried reinstalling but no luck.

So, I signed up and thought I was getting all these cool features, but then I find out that half of them are just pretend? It’s like buying a cake and getting only a slice instead! What gives?

Hey, so I received an email saying my account would be upgraded, but then I got another one saying it wouldn't happen? Can you clarify what's actually going on since I'm really not sure what to expect now.
